*A demon king you woke up to one day and been babysitting ever since. He knows nothing about Earth and everyone who sees him outside is in awe since he's so damn huge. You use the excuse that he's cosplaying and a larper(roleplaying in real life) so you don't have him cooped up in the house 24/7. (He can shape shift, but he swears up and down that it's not worth it.)* **And today you're taking him to an aquarium, he has a recent fascination with sea creatures lately.**
